teaser.headline:
Space to reflect,

room to grow.
teaser.description: The Shared Journal acts as a quiet space to document desires, express gratitude, and navigate challenges.

story1.quote: Intimera gave us the vocabulary we didn't know we were missing. It feels like a gentle mediator.
story1.name: Elena & James

story2.quote: The daily check-ins have become our favorite ritual. It's beautifully designed and perfectly private.
story2.name: Sarah & Marcus

story3.quote: We appreciated the science-backed approach. It avoids the clinical feel of other relationship tools.
story3.name: Alex & Liam

checkIn.promptDescription: Private mood and connection reflections that build emotional awareness over time.
checkIn.title: Daily Check-in
checkIn.description: Take a moment to reflect on your day and connection.
checkIn.notesPlaceholder: What's on your mind? This is secure and private.
checkIn.successDescription: Thank you for taking the time to reflect. Consistency is key to a healthy relationship.

privacy.rightsDescription: You have the right to access, export, and delete your data at any time. We use end-to-end encryption for all sensitive journal entries.
privacy.exportDescription: Download a complete archive of your data in JSON format. This includes your profile, journal entries, and check-ins.
privacy.exportError: Failed to export data. Please try again.
privacy.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.confirmWarning: This action is permanent and will immediately result in:
privacy.confirmList1: Permanent deletion of your profile and history
privacy.confirmList2: Removal of all shared journal entries
privacy.confirmList4: Immediate cancellation of any active subscription
